<mxfile host="Electron" agent="Mozilla/5.0 (Windows NT 10.0; Win64; x64) AppleWebKit/537.36 (KHTML, like Gecko) draw.io/29.0.3 Chrome/140.0.7339.249 Electron/38.7.0 Safari/537.36" version="29.0.3" scale="1" border="0"> <diagram name="Page-1" id="qERYyJisW4XqtGlDqiVL"> <mxGraphModel dx="3089" dy="-9992" grid="1" gridSize="10" guides="1" tooltips="1" connect="1" arrows="1" fold="1" page="1" pageScale="1" pageWidth="850" pageHeight="1100" math="0" shadow="0"> <root> <mxCell id="0" /> <mxCell id="1" parent="0" /> <mxCell id="2" value="" style="rounded=0;whiteSpace=wrap;html=1;strokeColor=none;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1300" y="50010" width="1110" height="420" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="3" value="VXLAN Encapsulated Packet" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;container=0;shadow=1;fillColor=#f9f7ed;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1318.3" y="50260" width="1070" height="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="4" value="Original Packet" style="whiteSpace=wrap;strokeWidth=1;verticalAlign=top;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;container=0;shadow=1;fillColor=#f5f5f5;fontColor=#333333;strokeColor=default;" vertex="1" parent="1"> <mxGeometry x="1543.3" y="50030" width="620" height="140" as="geometry" /> </mxCell> <mxCell id="5" value="VTEP Encapsulation" style="curved=1;startArrow=oval;endArrow=block;exitX=0.5;exitY=1;entryX=0.5;entryY=0;rounded=0;fontFamily=Verdana;fontSize=20;entryDx=0;entryDy=0;exitDx=0;exitDy=0;strokeWidth=2;shadow=1;strokeColor=default;endSize=10;startSize=8;startFill=1;endFill=1;" edge="1" source="4" target="3" parent="1"> <mxGeometry relative="1" as="geometry"> <Array as="points" /> </mxGeometry> </mxCell> <mxCell id="6" value="Outer Ethernet
